summary: Completed comprehensive testing of timeframe chart scaling functionality. Found critical issues: missing timeframes (180D, 1Y, 4H) and incorrect scaling behavior for existing timeframes (30D, 7D).

ui_bugs.issue: Missing critical timeframes - only 3 of 6 expected timeframes are present in UI
ui_bugs.details: UI only shows 1D, 7D, 30D buttons. Missing: 180D (6M), 1Y, 4H timeframes that were mentioned in requirements.

ui_bugs.issue: 30D timeframe shows limited range (~3 weeks) instead of full 30-day picture
ui_bugs.details: When clicking 30D, chart shows March 8-29 (3 weeks) instead of full 30-day period. Should use fitContent() for full picture.

ui_bugs.issue: 7D timeframe shows excessive range (2-3 months) instead of 7 days
ui_bugs.details: When clicking 7D, chart shows March-May data (2-3 months) instead of 7-day period. Should show full picture but within 7-day context.

integration_issues.issue: longTimeframes array fix not working properly - scaling behavior inconsistent
integration_issues.details: The ResearchChart.jsx longTimeframes array fix appears incomplete. 30D and 7D should use fitContent() but are showing incorrect ranges.

passed_tests: Chart component renders with proper canvas elements
Timeframe buttons are clickable and responsive
Chart updates when timeframe buttons are clicked
1D timeframe shows reasonable recent period (~1 month of data)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix incomplete timeframe implementation. 1) Add missing timeframe buttons (180D, 1Y, 4H) to UI. 2) Fix scaling logic - 30D shows only 3 weeks instead of full period, 7D shows 2-3 months instead of proper range. 3) Verify longTimeframes array ['7D', '30D', '180D', '1Y'] is properly connected to UI buttons and fitContent() logic. 4) The timeframe mapping between UI buttons and internal chart logic needs debugging.

success_percentage.frontend: 40% - Core chart works but timeframe scaling is broken, missing critical timeframes
